title: AI trading is surging, and when it connects to your AI wallet, will it helps to generate revenue faster
author: AIwalletexplorer
selftext:
AI trading is everywhere right now and I am searching about what happens when it's fully wired into an AI wallet. We're talking agents that monitor markets 24/7, execute trades in milliseconds, rebalance portfolios autonomously, and settle instantly.   
  
For enterprises, the use cases are real: treasury teams optimising idle cash, autonomous FX hedging, even multi-exchange arbitrage at machine speed. But here's my honest take, the excitement needs to be matched with serious caution. The security concerns are not small. Prompt injection attacks can manipulate your trading agent through the very data feeds it trusts. A compromised AI wallet doesn't send you a warning, it executes and settles on-chain immediately. I am excited to try out the new ideas and new products.   
  
At the same time, I need your advice!!!

comments.author: tinfoil_powers
comments.body: AI is not fast enough, generalizable enough, or secure enough for most tasks in the financial sector. Micro-LLMs pre-trained and well-harnessed are more useful. But blindly trusting an LLM is a fast and easy way to lose money, lose secure credentials, and create code vulnerabilities.
